name: Website Manipulations via SQL Injection
notes: This rule triggers when abnormal behaviour such as SQL Injection is observed.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.HTTP Opened, Application.Request Successful, Application.Request In Progress
when the event matches LOWER("URL Query String") matches '.*\b(select|union|delete|create|update|drop|insert|alter|merge|char)\b.*(from|in|all|where).*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Website Manipulations via SQL Injection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.HTTP Opened, Application.Request Successful, Application.Request In Progress
AND when the event matches LOWER("URL Query String") matches '.*\b(select|union|delete|create|update|drop|insert|alter|merge|char)\b.*(from|in|all|where).*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Website Manipulations via SQL Injection
Event description: Detects when abnormal behaviour such as SQL Injection is observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
